user_request: My artillery is failing during loading — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My artillery is failing during loading — help

### TOPIC
artillery loading

### COMPONENT
artillery

### OPERATION
loading

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- artillery
- loading

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the artillery, iron servant of the Omnissiah!
Congregation: We sanctify the artillery through loading!
Priest: First, verify the ammunition feed-mechanism with reverent inspection.
Congregation: The artillery shall not fail us in this hour!
Priest: Second, anoint the breech-block with sacred oils and recalibrate the loading apparatus.
Congregation: Praise the Machine Spirits of the artillery!
Priest: Third, invoke the loading sequence whilst chanting the Rite of Ballistic Ascension.
Congregation: The artillery rises to glory!

user_request: My inter-ship hailing is failing during operation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My inter-ship hailing is failing during operation — help

### TOPIC
inter-ship hailing

### COMPONENT
inter-ship hailing

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- inter-ship hailing
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hear me, vox-channels of the inter-ship hailing network!
Congregation: We invoke the inter-ship hailing in blessed operation!
Priest: First, purge all corrupted signal-data from the vox-casters with sacred flame.
Congregation: The inter-ship hailing responds to our devotion!
Priest: Second, realign the communication array to stellar true-north coordinates.
Congregation: Omnissiah guide our voices across the void!
Priest: Third, transmit the operation-sequence whilst the congregation chants the Hymn of Stellar Communion.
Congregation: Let the inter-ship hailing sing eternal!

user_request: Blessing for the bionics during synchronization
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the bionics during synchronization

### TOPIC
bionics synchronization

### COMPONENT
bionics

### OPERATION
synchronization

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bionics
- synchronization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O bionics, merged flesh and machine, hear our supplication!
Congregation: We bless the bionics through synchronization!
Priest: First, disconnect the bionics from all power-sources and cleanse the neural-interface ports.
Congregation: The bionics shall achieve perfect unity!
Priest: Second, initiate the synchronization protocol whilst the Machine Spirit awakens within.
Congregation: Praise the bionics and their eternal bond!
Priest: Third, restore full operational capacity to the bionics as the Omnissiah wills.
Congregation: The bionics are renewed in holy synchronization!

user_request: Emergency rite: restart after failure requires restart after failure
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: restart after failure requires restart after failure

### TOPIC
restart after failure

### COMPONENT
restart after failure

### OPERATION
restart after failure

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- restart after failure
- restart after failure

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: From the abyss of failure, we call upon the restart after failure!
Congregation: Grant us the restart after failure in this darkest hour!
Priest: First, sever all power conduits and allow the sacred capacitors to bleed their charge into the void.
Congregation: The restart after failure approaches!
Priest: Second, recite the Liturgy of Resurrection whilst performing the restart after failure sequence.
Congregation: Omnissiah, restore what was lost!
Priest: Third, reinitialize all systems through the restart after failure protocol with blessed precision.
Congregation: We are reborn through the restart after failure!

user_request: Prayer for calibration of the cutting laser
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for calibration of the cutting laser

### TOPIC
cutting laser calibration

### COMPONENT
cutting laser

### OPERATION
calibration

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- cutting laser
- calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O cutting laser, instrument of divine severance, attend to our prayer!
Congregation: We invoke the calibration of the cutting laser!
Priest: First, align the cutting laser optics to the sacred geometry of the calibration matrix.
Congregation: The cutting laser thirsts for precision!
Priest: Second, energize the cutting laser at half-power whilst chanting the Mantra of Focused Radiance.
Congregation: The cutting laser burns with holy purpose!
Priest: Third, verify the cutting laser's output against the calibration standard and adjust the lensing apparatus.
Congregation: Perfect calibration has been achieved!

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: prevention on overheating

### TOPIC
overheating prevention

### COMPONENT
overheating

### OPERATION
prevention

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- overheating
- prevention

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hear us, overheating spirits of the machine-temples!
Congregation: We invoke prevention against the overheating curse!
Priest: First, inspect all thermal-dissipation channels and remove any accumulated particulate matter.
Congregation: The overheating shall not consume us!
Priest: Second, apply the prevention-blessed coolant to the overheating-vulnerable junction points.
Congregation: Blessed overheating prevention flows eternal!
Priest: Third, recalibrate the thermal regulators to enforce prevention protocols with absolute authority.
Congregation: The overheating is held at bay by the Omnissiah's grace!

user_request: Rite request: operation on solar panel alignment
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on solar panel alignment

### TOPIC
solar panel alignment

### COMPONENT
solar panel alignment

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- solar panel alignment
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Solar panels, drinkers of the Emperor's light, hear our devotion!
Congregation: We bless the solar panel alignment in righteous operation!
Priest: First, activate the servo-motors that govern the solar panel alignment with sacred precision.
Congregation: The solar panel alignment turns toward the star!
Priest: Second, monitor the operation of the solar panel alignment whilst the sun's blessed rays strike true.
Congregation: Power flows through the solar panel alignment!
Priest: Third, lock the solar panel alignment into optimal position as the operation reaches completion.
Congregation: The solar panel alignment achieves eternal glory!

user_request: The servitor demands guidance for programming upload
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The servitor demands guidance for programming upload

### TOPIC
servitor programming upload

### COMPONENT
servitor

### OPERATION
programming upload

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- servitor
- programming upload

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Servitor of flesh and wire, receive the blessing of programming upload!
Congregation: We invoke the programming upload into the servitor's holy neural-lattice!
Priest: First, prepare the servitor's cranial interface by removing all protective seals and blessing the data-ports.
Congregation: The servitor awaits the programming upload!
Priest: Second, transmit the programming upload whilst the servitor's Machine Spirit remains in sacred receptivity.
Congregation: The servitor drinks deep of the programming upload!
Priest: Third, verify the programming upload has fully integrated into the servitor's operational matrix.
Congregation: The servitor is reborn through programming upload!

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the Knight ion shield before activation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the Knight ion shield before activation

### TOPIC
Knight ion shield activation

### COMPONENT
Knight ion shield

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Knight ion shield
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Mighty Knight ion shield, aegis of the blessed war-engine, hear our litany!
Congregation: We steady the Knight ion shield before its activation!
Priest: First, purge all corrupted power-cells from the Knight ion shield's primary conduits with holy flame.
Congregation: The Knight ion shield glows with divine readiness!
Priest: Second, chant the Invocation of Shielding whilst the Knight ion shield's capacitors charge to full potential.
Congregation: The Knight ion shield rises to protect us!
Priest: Third, authorize the activation sequence for the Knight ion shield as the Machine Spirits sing in unison.
Congregation: The Knight ion shield descends upon our foes!

user_request: Emergency rite: vital signs monitor requires calibration
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: vital signs monitor requires calibration

### TOPIC
vital signs monitor calibration

### COMPONENT
vital signs monitor

### OPERATION
calibration

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- vital signs monitor
- calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Vital signs monitor, sacred sentinel of the flesh-machine interface, we beseech thee!
Congregation: We invoke the calibration of the vital signs monitor!
Priest: First, disconnect the vital signs monitor from all subject-entities and cleanse its sensory probes with sterile saline.
Congregation: The vital signs monitor awaits restoration!
Priest: Second, recalibrate the vital signs monitor against the blessed standard readings whilst chanting the Rite of Vitality.
Congregation: The vital signs monitor awakens to duty!
Priest: Third, reconnect the vital signs monitor to its monitoring apparatus and verify perfect calibration has been achieved.
Congregation: The vital signs monitor shall serve us true!
